name: orchestrate-work
description: A single-plugin marketplace for the orchestrate-work skill: model-fleet routing by cost/intelligence/taste with pass/fail bars and a pre-push gate.

plugins.name: orchestrate-work
plugins.description: Decide which model or agent should handle a piece of work based on cost, intelligence, and taste tradeoffs, require a pass/fail bar before delegating, and gate every commit against standing invariants.
